title: Loafly
description: Transforming your world with improved performance and an enhanced gameplay experience!
body:
**Step into a polished and immersive Minecraft experience that enhances vanilla gameplay without straying too far from the original charm. This modpack focuses on exploration, combat, performance, and immersion while keeping things accessible and lightweight.**

---

**⚠️ Note: You must manually install Cupboard Library for this modpack to work properly. It is not included in the modpack by default.**

---

# 🧭 Features:
# 
- Vast world generation with new biomes and dungeons
- Enhanced first-person visuals and animations
- Improved combat inspired by Minecraft Dungeons
- Tons of QoL upgrades and UI enhancements
- Vanilla-friendly visual and sound effects
- Native voice chat support
- Optimized performance for smooth gameplay
- Controller support with Midnight Controls
- Built-in replay and Discord Rich Presence

Whether you're exploring alone or with friends, this pack delivers a crisp, immersive survival experience.
## ⚠️ Compatibility Warning

This modpack is not compatible with Sodium or Iris.
It uses Embeddium and NeOculus instead. Mixing rendering mods may cause crashes or graphical bugs.
If you want to change performance or graphics mods, do so very carefully and at your own risk.

## ⚠️ Multiplayer Warning

Joining online servers will not work unless it's a LAN server created using the included mod E4MC.
This modpack is designed for singleplayer or local multiplayer (LAN) only.
### 📡 LAN Multiplayer Notice:
LAN multiplayer is only supported if all players have this modpack installed. It has not been tested with only one player using the modpack, and it's very likely it will not work properly in that case. However, if both players have the full modpack installed, LAN play should work seamlessly.

## 💡 Suggestions & 🐛 Bug Reports

Got an idea for a new feature? Found a bug?
Feel free to DM me on Discord: @thefard1
I’m always open to feedback and improvements!
